# mxroute_quota (Data Source)

Fetches the account-wide storage quota from the MXroute account, including per-category usage and any active over-quota grace period.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `breakdown` (Attributes) Per-category storage usage, in bytes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--breakdown))
- `grace_period` (Attributes) The over-quota grace period, or null when the account is within its limit. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--grace_period))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the account username.
- `percent_used` (Number) Fraction of the total limit currently used, as a percentage.
- `total_limit` (Number) Total storage limit for the account, in bytes (0 means unlimited).
- `total_used` (Number) Total storage used across the account, in bytes.
- `updated_at` (String) When the quota figures were last computed.
- `username` (String) The account username the quota belongs to.

<a id="nestedatt--breakdown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `breakdown`

Read-Only:

- `backups` (Number) Storage used by backups, in bytes.
- `databases` (Number) Storage used by databases, in bytes.
- `email` (Number) Storage used by email, in bytes.
- `other` (Number) Storage used by other categories, in bytes.
- `web` (Number) Storage used by web hosting, in bytes.


<a id="nestedatt--grace_period"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grace_period`

Read-Only:

- `days_remaining` (Number) Days remaining in the grace period before enforcement.
- `deadline` (String) The grace period deadline.
